tonight_tidbit.text: May baseball. The weather warms up and the standings start to mean something.

notable_injuries.description: The Nationals placed Lord on the 15-day injured list Thursday with left side tightness.
Williams (elbow) is slated to make his third rehab start Wednesday at Triple-A Rochester, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
Irvin (shoulder) is slated to face live hitters in batting practice Wednesday, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
The Nationals transferred Parker (elbow) to the 60-day injured list Wednesday.
The Nationals placed Lovelady on the 15-day injured list Monday with a left triceps strain.
Herz (elbow) was diagnosed Monday with a left flexor strain, Kyle Williams of TheBanner.com reports.
Kranick (elbow) began a rehab assignment with Single-A Fredericksburg on Sunday, striking out two over 1.2 perfect innings.

Waldichuk (elbow) underwent Tommy John surgery and an internal brace procedure April 21 and is hopeful to return to game action at some point early in the 2027 season, Mark Zuckerman of MASNSports.com reports.
Gray (elbow) has resumed a throwing program, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
